description: Use this API to add a participating generation reserve unit to a previously defined period reserve constraint in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_perrsv_gen(rsvid, eibus, genid)

parameters.name: rsvid
parameters.description: Period reserve identifier (1 through 15). (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: specified unit does not have any generator reserve data defined.
specified unit is already participating in the reserve constraint.
generator reserve participating unit table full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
